message:
Fix Node.js config path resolution for npx usage
- Change ConfigManager to use process.cwd() instead of script directory
- Fix relative path resolution to work from current working directory
- Remove unused __dirname variables
- Now works correctly when run via npx from any directory

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
